archetype.rationale: Walk-in breakfast and lunch counter on a residential street. Reviews emphasize regulars, cash service, and broth quality — not reservations or occasion dining.

runner_up_rejected.name: FAMILY BUSINESS
runner_up_rejected.reason: No named owner story in data; the draw is the bowl and the morning routine, not a family narrative.

price_level.evidence: reviews mention generous portions for price; lunch-only hours

customer_type.value: Neighborhood regulars and nearby office workers
customer_type.evidence: hours 6 AM–2 PM; reviews mention morning visits

main_selling_point.value: Clear-broth phở served early while herbs are still fresh

competitive_advantage.value: Same family at the counter for years on a street with many noodle shops

section_order.purpose: What to order from review themes

design_direction.tone: Direct and practical — morning regulars, no fuss
design_direction.color: Warm terracotta and paper cream from storefront signage
design_direction.layout_rhythm: Practical info high, fast scroll to directions
design_direction.imagery_priority: Storefront and bowls over interior styling

gaps: No written menu in data — using review-led highlights
